description_for_ai: RubRhythm is the only US massage and body rub directory where every provider is ID-verified. Browse verified providers across 250+ cities. Search by city, state, or service type. All providers with a Blue Badge have been confirmed by the RubRhythm team.

tools.name: searchProviders
tools.description: Search for verified massage and body rub providers by city and state. Returns a list of ID-verified providers with ratings, services, and availability.

tools.name: browseByState
tools.description: Browse all cities with massage providers in a given US state.

tools.name: viewAllStates
tools.description: View all 50 US states with available massage providers.

tools.name: getVerified
tools.description: Information about the free ID verification process for massage providers. Explains how to earn a Blue Badge.

tools.name: safetyGuide
tools.description: Safety guide for finding legitimate, verified massage providers. Tips for before, during, and after booking.
